Video.summary: Alex doesn’t think he’s the father of Halie’s baby girl because he suspects she’s unfaithful. Next, Kenchada has been on a revenge spree since Armando cheated on her 4 years ago. Can these relationships be saved?
Video.title: The Most Toxic Relationships Ever

Video.summary: Tina and her ex-boyfriend “G” split up after she revealed her pregnancy and he became abusive. She believes his ex Patrice is placing doubts in his head to keep them apart and “G” contends Tina is out to get him, but wants to be in the child’s life.
Video.title: A Pattern of Abuse?

Video.summary: Jannice fears telling her mother that she is a lesbian because she may get disowned.
Video.title: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Image.alt: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Video.summary: Recapping stories involving deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Steve Gets Justice For Children

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!
Video.title: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Image.alt: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Video.summary: A teenage boy abuses his mom, often getting his younger brother involved. He says that he got the idea when he'd witnessed one of his mother's boyfriends pull a knife on her.
Video.title: We Beat Up Our Mom

Video.summary: Did Marcus’s ex’s boyfriend Charles molest their son? Ex Jamaica is torn between kicking out Charles for the meanwhile and wondering if Marcus’s girlfriend Tonya is lying to gain custody of the boy. What will Charles’s lie detector test say?
Video.title: A Mother's Wrath

Video.summary: Hannah is tired of Nick's crazy accusations, hacking into her computer and texting her friends pretending to be her. Then, Nicole says she's never cheated on her husband Robert. She also claims that the constant accusations caused her to miscarry.
Video.title: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Image.alt: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Video.summary: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.
Video.title: I Hope I'm Not The Father

Image.alt: I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father

Video.summary: After spending years in prison for a crime he says he did not commit, Sontay accuses his ex-girlfriend's family of setting him up.
Video.title: Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?

Image.alt: Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?
Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?
Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?

Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Josephine's family was ripped apart after her boyfriend Mark was accused of molestation. Her son, Anthony and his girlfriend, Renee believe Mark molested their 2 year old son. But Mark believes that Renee coached her son to say this!
Video.title: I Believe My Son!

Video.summary: After living apart, Anthony believes Harley cheated on him with at least one of her male roommates and abuses her. Then, Dana fears her son Jamel is abusing his girlfriend and grandkid’s mother, Katrina. Can Steve help these violent men?
Video.title: Abused Teens Choose a Door

Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.
Video.title: I Saw You Through The Window

Image.alt: I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window

Video.summary: While out looking for work, Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was taken to the hospital where she died. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!
Video.title: A Tragic Accident

Video.summary: Maria's fiance texts their ex-roommate, saying he wants to leave Maria and be with her; Lisa has lost four jobs because her partner overzealously tries to prevent her from cheating on him.
Video.title: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Image.alt: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Video.summary: Noah and Kendra had a yearlong fling, but when he finally visited her, she had a baby and claimed he was the father! Marvin and Rainy have been married for almost 6 years, but two weeks ago, she received a call saying that Marvin had cheated on her!
Video.title: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Image.alt: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Video.summary: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Nick believes he's always been meant to be with Megan, even though he's only known her for 5 months. Megan however tells a very different tale, where Nick is imagining all the fate and passion between them. She claims they hardly know each other, and they've surely never slept together. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.
Video.title: Did We Have Sex?

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Video.summary: Lisa has had all six of her children REMOVED from her home as a result of neglect and abuse which she still tries to justify.
Video.title: I Lost 6 of My Kids

Video.summary: Andrew believes Margarita cheated on him throughout their 13-year relationship; Sarah believes Wendell may be cheating on her.
Video.title: One Recording Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Risha is accused of being involved in her best friend's murder; an update on Tabatha, who revealed on the show that her boyfriend allowed her to prostitute so they could get high together.
Video.title: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Video.summary: Debra lost custody of her 7 kids due to abuse allegations. Her daughters Alisha and Ariel want to know what happened to them years ago. Debra moved in with Alisha, but allegedly slept with her husband! Can Debra prove her innocence to her kids?
Video.title: Our Mom Is A Monster

Video.summary: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of hurting his girlfriend's child.
Video.title: You Failed Five Times?

Video.summary: Jennifer spent years tracking down her biological mother and when she finally did, she her mother’s husband, Rodney, drove them apart after she turned him down. Refusing to lose her mother again, she turns to Steve for help!
Video.title: Mom, Who Do You Believe?

Video.summary: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s jealousy and abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealous ways have torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?
Video.title: She Is My Property

Video.summary: Theresa and Darron were arrested for child endangerment after their toddler daughter was spotted begging for food and now face sexual abuse accusations. Then, Megan believes her fiancé Mark physically abused her baby, and possibly broke his leg!
Video.title: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Image.alt: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Video.summary: Dakia accuses her sister of stealing $12,000 worth of jewelry from her home; Dante believes his brother-in-law stole $2,000 from a friend.
Video.title: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Image.alt: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest
